since_last: 37% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.35%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC -1.88% · Gold -0.75% · Nasdaq100 -1.26%. 37% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.35%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.35%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -8.24%
cards.body: Leaders: INTU +4.19%, WDAY +3.15%, CRM +2.77%, TTD +2.76%, NOW +2.30%. Laggards: SKHY -8.24%, ARM -6.66%, MU -6.28%, MRVL -6.13%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.51% at $141.65
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.51% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
